NAVAREA XIX 77/22
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT　 131830 UTC JUN 22
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 70-37.6N 023-31.9E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 65-47.8N 007-34.2E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 65-05.2N 006-40.9E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
  NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　76/22
